name: BSE Limited
summary: BSE Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides a platform for trading in equity, debt instruments, derivatives, and mutual funds in India and internationally. The company also offers securities, data dissemination, and depository services. In addition, it provides clearing and settlement; IT support; training; and investment services, as well as engages in the corporate social responsibility activities. The company was formerly known as Bombay Stock Exchange Limited and changed its name to BSE Limited in July 2011. BSE Limited was founded in 1875 and is based in Mumbai, India.
